originalTitle: Live RL dev -- don't suffer, use Puffer!
title: Porting Pong to Native C and Deploying Online with PufferLib
summary: Ported a contributor's Pong environment from Python/Cython to native C for web deployment, integrated it into PufferLib's environment collection, and began a breakout port. Also debugged ELO calculation logic for the MOBA environment and fixed neural MMO installation issues.
